closed_world.value: High school setting where CIA-trained protagonist is placed undercover
closed_world.quote: "It's your lucky day. Your going to high school," Paul said with a smile on his face.

investigator.value: CIA-trained protagonist Celia (undercover as different identity) placed in civilian setting
investigator.quote: Working in the CIA was a part of me that stuck like a piece of gum.

social_world.value: CIA compound hierarchy with Paul as handler controlling protagonist's missions and identity
social_world.quote: Working in the CIA was a part of me that stuck like a piece of gum. Everytime you try to walk away it just keeps following you.

alibi.value: Identity transformation with new appearance and name to avoid recognition during school mission
alibi.quote: My once dark brown hair was now dark red along with my eyebrows. My hazel eyes were transformed into a dark green.

investigator_wound.value: Abandonment trauma and forced premature maturation creating emotional isolation
investigator_wound.quote: I never knew my parents. They kicked me to the f*cking curb. Literally.
